channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Las Vegas Grand Prix in better shape after ironing out inaugural year kinks that nearly ruined race
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — There’s never been a faster, more jaw-dropping 180-degree turn than the one Max Verstappen took a year ago at the inaugural Las Vegas Grand Prix.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sharks unable to recover in Dallas after slow start to second period
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks play St. Louis Blues next, then return home to play the Buffalo Sabres on Saturday when the team will raise Joe Thornton's No. 19 to the rafters at SAP Center.
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Chris Sale and Tarik Skubal take Cy Young Awards after both were pitching triple crown winners
item.description: Chris Sale was one of the ace left-handers Tarik Skubal idolized as a teenager. Now the two will be linked forever after winning their first Cy Young Awards on Wednesday. Skubal was a unanimous pick for the American League honor following a brilliant season with the Detroit Tigers.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Republican leaders urge conference to ban trans athletes in women's sports amid San Jose State controversy
item.description: Thirteen Republican leaders signed off on a letter to the Mountain West Conference, urging it to ban transgender athletes from participating in women's sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: MLB will test robot umpires at 13 spring training ballparks hosting 19 teams
item.description: Major League Baseball will test robot umpires as part of a challenge system during spring training at 13 ballparks hosting 19 teams, which could lead to regular-season use in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Manfred says Tampa area politicians will be given time to sort out Rays' ballpark situation
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Tampa area politicians will be given time to sort out the Rays' ballpark situation following Hurricane Milton, and baseball Commissioner Rob Manfred said there has been no thought to allowing the team to explore a relocation.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Central Michigan coach Jim McElwain to retire at the end of this season
item.description: Central Michigan football coach Jim McElwain will retire following this season, his sixth year with the Mid-American Conference program.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Big Game Bound: 'Harbaugh Bowl' set for Monday Night Football
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS – Six teams enter week 12 of the NFL season on fire. The Lions, Bills, Eagles, Steelers, Cardinals, and Chargers are all riding winning streaks of four or more games.
item.dc:creator: Phil Nardiello - Senior Sports Producer, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 20 years later: A look back at the Malice at the Palace
item.description: (WXIN/WTTV) — It has now been 20 whole years since the most infamous night in Indiana Pacers franchise history: The Malice at the Palace. One of the worst brawls in U.S. sports history, the incident occurred on Nov.
item.dc:creator: Joe Schroeder, NewsNation

item.title: Trump feuded with NFL players in his first term. Now, some are busting out his dance moves
item.description: Donald Trump and the National Football League had an adversarial relationship during his first term in the White House.
item.dc:creator: Arnie Stapleton, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lockers used by Ronaldo, Beckham and other Real Madrid stars are up for auction
item.description: LONDON (AP) — It's a sports fan’s perfect storage solution: Metal lockers that once held the sweat-stained shirts and muddy cleats of some of the world’s greatest soccer players are up for auction. Sotheby’s is selling 24 lockers from the dressing room of storied club Real Madrid.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cleveland to bid for WNBA team. City has strong history with women's hoops, Rockers once in league
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Cleveland wants back in the WNBA game. With interest in women's pro basketball surging, Rock Entertainment Group, which is also tied into the NBA's Cavaliers, is trying to bring a WNBA expansion team to Cleveland.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Police may have suspects in Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce burglaries
item.description: One week after high end burglaries targeting Kansas City Chiefs stars Patrick Mahomes and Travis Kelce, FOX4 is learning who could be behind them.
item.dc:creator: Malik Jackson, NewsNation

item.title: An emotional Rafael Nadal retires at the Davis Cup after he loses and Spain is eliminated
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Rafael Nadal bit his lower lip and his reddened eyes welled with tears as he stood alongside his Davis Cup teammates for Spain's national anthem Tuesday before what he — and everyone — knew might be the last match of his career.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nuggets guard Russell Westbook posts 200th career triple-double in win over Grizzlies
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Denver Nuggets guard Russell Westbrook posted the 200th triple-double of his career on Tuesday night in a win over Memphis. The NBA recordholder for triple-doubles reached the milestone late in a 122-110 victory.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alex Killorn helps the Ducks beat the Blackhawks 3-2 for their third straight win
item.description: Alex Killorn had a goal and an assist in the third period, and the Anaheim Ducks beat the Chicago Blackhawks 3-2 on Tuesday night for their season-high third straight win.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Kam Jones gets triple-double as No. 15 Marquette trounces No. 6 Purdue 76-58
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Kam Jones had 17 points, 13 rebounds and 10 assists as No. 15 Marquette defeated No. 6 Purdue 76-58 on Tuesday night to snap the Boilermakers’ 39-game regular-season nonconference winning streak.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kansas coach Bill Self reaches 800 wins. His big goal this season is a 3rd national title
item.description: One week after Bill Self became the winningest coach at Kansas, the Hall of Famer joined John Calipari and Rick Barnes as the only active Division I head coaches with 800 wins.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lynne Roberts leaves Utah for WNBA job
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In a shocking announcement Tuesday evening, Lynne Roberts is leaving the University of Utah women's basketball program to become the head coach of the Los Angeles Sparks of the WNBA.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USU seeks to overturn loss in forfeited volleyball game against San Jose State
item.description: Just hours after Utah lawmakers urged Utah State University to join a Title IX lawsuit against the Mountain West Conference, the Logan-based school filed a motion to join the lawsuit, in part.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Debris falls from roof at home of Cowboys before game against Texans
item.description: A piece of the roof at the home of the Dallas Cowboys fell to the field while the retractable portion of it was being opened at least three hours before a 34-10 loss to Houston on Monday night, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Ovechkin scores twice as Washington beats Utah, 6-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - One of the joys of having an NHL team is to watch the game's greatest players come to Salt Lake City. On Monday, the great Alex Ovechkin put on a show for the Utah Hockey Club fans.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Zach LaVine's 16 fourth-quarter points lead Bulls past Pistons 122-112
item.description: Zach LaVine scored 16 of his 25 points in the fourth quarter and the Chicago Bulls pulled away for a 122-112 win against the Detroit Pistons on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Giants bench Daniel Jones, give nod to Tommy DeVito
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The Giants did exactly what you expected today in one respect, they benched starter Daniel Jones, and in doing so, his days as a member of the Giants franchise are over. Who will be the starter on Sunday against Tampa Bay? Jersey's own, Tommy DeVito.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Trump dance takes over sports world
item.description: Supporters of President-elect Donald Trump have been paying homage on the gridiron and inside the octagon in recent days.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Jazz comeback falls short against Clippers, 116-105
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - James Harden moved into second place on the NBA's career 3-point list and had 20 points and 11 assists to help the Los Angeles Clippers beat the Utah Jazz 116-105 on Sunday night to end a three-game losing streak. Harden moved past Ray Allen with No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Sengun records triple-double, VanVleet scores 28 in Rockets 143-107 rout of Bulls
item.description: Fred VanVleet scored a season-high 28 points, Alperen Sengun had 20 points, 11 rebounds and 11 assists for his second triple-double this season and the Houston Rockets routed the Chicago Bulls 143-107 on Sunday night for their fifth straight win.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Rays will have to weather the storm next season at Steinbrenner Field
item.description: As the Tampa Bay Rays begin to gather information for their 2025 season at Steinbrenner Field in Tampa, the most unpredictable and challenging element will most likely be weather.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Report: Kris Byrant's Lamborghini Huracan stolen from Colorado home
item.description: Kris Bryant's Lamborghini Huracan was stolen by a multi-state vehicle theft ring, but was recovered by police in Las Vegas after they traced the stolen vehicle to a home in the city.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bears show moxie against Packers, fall short for 4th straight week as Santos FG is blocked as time expires
item.description: The Chicago Bears lost to the Green Bay Packers 20-19, setting a new record for the longest win streak in the historic rivalry, breaking a tie with a 10-game win streak from 1994 to 1998.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Trump attends UFC championship fight in New York, taking break from Cabinet picks
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump walked out to a roaring standing ovation just ahead of the start of the UFC pay-per-view card at Madison Square Garden on Saturday night, combining two things close to his heart: fierce battles inside the octagon and New York City.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jazz unable to hold fourth quarter lead in loss to Kings
item.description: SACRAMENTO (ABC4 Sports) - After scoring 60 points in a losing effort the night before, De'Aaron Fox scored 49 points to lead the Sacramento Kings to a 121-117 win over the Utah Jazz on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
